package rulecoverage

func NegativePgxpoolPingPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "pgxpool_ping_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Per-request pgxpool connectivity probes that add latency outside health-check boundaries."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
